name: test_login_error_schema_missing_fields
description: POST /login with empty body — error body must match LOGIN_ERROR_SCHEMA.
descriptionHtml: POST /login with empty body — error body must match LOGIN_ERROR_SCHEMA.
statusTrace:
tests/test_schema_validation.py:241: in test_login_error_schema_missing_fields
    assert response.status_code == 400, (
E   AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty payload, got 429. Body: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.","upgrade":{"message":"Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.","tier":"free","_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"Too many requests. E   assert 429 == 400
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
